mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, trigger_source, start_url, goal, device_preset, CAST(environment_jsonb AS TEXT) AS environment_jsonb, scenario_template_version_id, scenario_plan_schema_version, CAST(scenario_plan_jsonb AS TEXT) AS scenario_plan_jsonb, CAST(scenario_overrides_jsonb AS TEXT) AS scenario_overrides_jsonb, status, result_completeness, analysis_status, current_step_order, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_by, idempotency_key, idempotency_request_hash, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM test_run WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, run_id, step_order, step_key, step_name, stage, step_type, status, started_at, finished_at, error_code, error_message FROM test_run_step WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY step_order ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_run ( id, project_id, name, trigger_source, start_url, goal, device_preset, environment_jsonb, scenario_template_version_id, scenario_plan_schema_version, scenario_plan_jsonb, scenario_overrides_jsonb, status, result_completeness, analysis_status, current_step_order, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_by, idempotency_key, idempotency_request_hash ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{triggerSource}, #{startUrl}, #{goal}, #{devicePreset}, CAST(#{environmentJson} AS jsonb), #{scenarioTemplateVersionId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{scenarioPlanSchemaVersion}, CAST(#{scenarioPlanJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{scenarioOverridesJson} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{resultCompleteness}, #{analysisStatus}, #{currentStepOrder}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{idempotencyRequestHash} )

INSERT INTO test_run ( id, project_id, name, trigger_source, start_url, goal, device_preset, environment_jsonb, scenario_template_version_id, scenario_plan_schema_version, scenario_plan_jsonb, scenario_overrides_jsonb, status, result_completeness, analysis_status, current_step_order, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_by, idempotency_key, idempotency_request_hash ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{triggerSource}, #{startUrl}, #{goal}, #{devicePreset}, CAST(#{environmentJson} AS jsonb), #{scenarioTemplateVersionId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{scenarioPlanSchemaVersion}, CAST(#{scenarioPlanJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{scenarioOverridesJson} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{resultCompleteness}, #{analysisStatus}, #{currentStepOrder}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{idempotencyRequestHash} ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO test_run_step ( id, run_id, step_order, step_key, step_name, stage, step_type, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepKey}, #{stepName}, #{stage}, #{stepType}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE test_run SET status = #{nextStatus}, result_completeness = #{resultCompleteness}, started_at = #{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, finished_at = #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run SET status = 'FAILED', result_completeness = #{resultCompleteness}, finished_at = #{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, failure_code = #{failureCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, failure_message = #{failureMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET current_step_order = GREATEST(COALESCE(current_step_order, 0), #{currentStepOrder}), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET latest_checkpoint_id = #{checkpointId}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET latest_artifact_id = #{artifactId}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET latest_report_id = #{reportId}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run SET analysis_status = 'QUEUED', latest_analysis_job_id = #{analysisJobId}, friction_score = NULL, latest_report_id = NULL, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run SET analysis_status = #{analysisStatus}, friction_score = #{frictionScore,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, latest_report_id = #{reportId,jdbcType=OTHER}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND latest_analysis_job_id = #{analysisJobId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run_step SET status = #{nextStatus}, started_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{startedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), started_at), finished_at = COALESCE(CAST(#{finishedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AS TIMESTAMPTZ), finished_at), error_code = #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_message = #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{stepId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_run_event ( id, run_id, step_id, event_type, source, payload_jsonb, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{stepId}, #{eventType}, #{source}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb), #{occurredAt} )

INSERT INTO runner_agent_event ( id, run_id, task_id, attempt_id, agent_event_id, step_index, event_type, payload_jsonb, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{taskId}, #{attemptId}, #{agentEventId}, #{stepIndex}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb), #{occurredAt} ) ON CONFLICT (run_id, agent_event_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT CAST(jsonb_set(t.trace_jsonb, '{trace_id}', to_jsonb(t.trace_id::text), true) AS TEXT) AS trace_jsonb FROM runner_agent_trace t JOIN test_run r ON r.id = t.run_id WHERE r.project_id = #{projectId} AND r.start_url = #{startUrl} AND COALESCE(r.goal, '') = COALESCE(#{goal}, '') AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.run_id != #{excludeRunId} AND (t.final_outcome = 'SUCCESS' OR t.final_outcome LIKE 'SUCCESS\_%' ESCAPE '\') ORDER BY t.finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, t.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO runner_agent_trace ( id, run_id, trace_id, task_id, attempt_id, final_outcome, trace_jsonb, started_at, finished_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{traceId}, #{taskId}, #{attemptId}, #{finalOutcome}, CAST(#{traceJson} AS jsonb), #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (run_id, trace_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE test_run SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
